description: Leading healthcare API platform providing universal integration to EHR systems. Single API connection to integrate with any EHR including Epic, Cerner, athenahealth, and 50+ other systems. Accelerates digital health deployment by eliminating need for custom integrations.
business_model: B2B - API platform to digital health companies and healthcare IT vendors
target_market: Digital health startups, healthcare IT vendors, health systems
competitive_advantage: Single API for all EHRs, accelerates go-to-market, reduces integration costs from $100K+ to subscription model

varden_fit.rationale: Infrastructure benchmark - similar to Leyr. Demonstrates massive market need for healthcare API platforms
